# DryUI component reference

> Machine-readable component import, props, styling hook, and example index for 160 DryUI components.

Theme imports:
- @dryui/ui/themes/default.css
- @dryui/ui/themes/dark.css

### action

## Button
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: action
Tags: form, action, click, submit, cta, link-button
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Button } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Button } from '@dryui/ui/button'
Props: variant (ButtonVariant), Button treatment from solid primary actions to ghost and inline link styles., default 'solid' | size (ButtonSize), Button density preset, including icon-only sizing variants., default 'md' | color (ButtonColor), Semantic tone for primary or destructive button actions., default 'primary' | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | href (string), Destination URL when the component renders as a link., When provided, Button renders an anchor instead of a button for link-style actions. | rel (string), Relationship between the current document and the linked resource. | target (string), Browsing context used for link navigation. | download (boolean | string), Requests download behavior when the component renders as a link. | type ('button' | 'submit' | 'reset'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted button, submit, reset, default 'button' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-btn-accent, --dry-btn-accent-active, --dry-btn-accent-fg, --dry-btn-accent-hover, --dry-btn-accent-stroke, --dry-btn-accent-weak, --dry-btn-bg, --dry-btn-border, --dry-btn-color, --dry-btn-font-size, --dry-btn-ghost-underline, --dry-btn-on-accent, --dry-btn-padding-x, --dry-btn-padding-y, --dry-btn-radius, --dry-btn-soft-active-bg, --dry-btn-soft-bg, --dry-btn-soft-hover-bg, --dry-btn-trigger-open-bg, --dry-btn-trigger-open-border, --dry-btn-trigger-open-color
Data attributes: data-color | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-group-orientation | data-in-group | data-size | data-variant
Accessibility: Provide discernible text or an aria-label for icon-only buttons. | Use the href prop for navigation so the element keeps link semantics.
Example:
```svelte
<Button variant="solid" onclick={handleClick}>Save</Button>
<Button href="/getting-started" variant="outline">Continue</Button>
```

## Toggle
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: action
Tags: button, toggle, pressed, switch
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Toggle } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Toggle } from '@dryui/ui/toggle'
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | icon (Snippet) | pressed (boolean), default false, bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-btn-bg, --dry-btn-border, --dry-btn-justify, --dry-btn-min-height, --dry-btn-padding-x, --dry-btn-padding-y, --dry-btn-radius
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-size | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Toggle>Content</Toggle>
```

## ToggleGroup
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: action
Tags: button, toggle, group, select
Kind: compound
Root import: import { ToggleGroup } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { ToggleGroup } from '@dryui/ui/toggle-group'
Parts:
- ToggleGroup.Root
  Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | type ('single' | 'multiple'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted single, multiple, default 'single' | value (string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default [], bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- ToggleGroup.Item
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  ToggleGroup.Root
    ToggleGroup.Item
CSS variables: --dry-tg-font-size, --dry-tg-min-height, --dry-tg-padding-x, --dry-tg-padding-y, --dry-tg-radius
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-size | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<ToggleGroup.Root>
  <ToggleGroup.Item>...</ToggleGroup.Item>
</ToggleGroup.Root>
```

## Clipboard
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: action
Tags: copy, clipboard, paste, text
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Clipboard } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Clipboard } from '@dryui/ui/clipboard'
Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | timeout (number), default 2000 | children (Snippet<[{ copied: boolean; copy: () => void }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-clipboard | data-copied
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Clipboard>Content</Clipboard>
```

## ScrollToTop
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: action
Tags: scroll, navigation, top, button
Kind: simple
Root import: import { ScrollToTop } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { ScrollToTop } from '@dryui/ui/scroll-to-top'
Props: position ('bottom-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-center'), accepted bottom-right, bottom-left, bottom-center, default 'bottom-right' | class (string) | threshold (number), default 300 | target (HTMLElement | undefined), Browsing context used for link navigation. | behavior (ScrollBehavior), default 'smooth' | children (Snippet<[{ visible: boolean; scrollToTop: () => void }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-position | data-visible
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<ScrollToTop>Content</ScrollToTop>
```

## FloatButton
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: action
Tags: fab, float, action, button, expand
Kind: compound
Root import: import { FloatButton } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { FloatButton } from '@dryui/ui/float-button'
Parts:
- FloatButton.Root
  Props: position ('bottom-right' | 'bottom-left'), accepted bottom-right, bottom-left, default 'bottom-right' | open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false, bindable | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- FloatButton.Trigger
  Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- FloatButton.Action
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  FloatButton.Root
    FloatButton.Trigger
    FloatButton.Action
CSS variables: --dry-fab-gap, --dry-fab-offset, --dry-fab-position, --dry-fab-z-index
Data attributes: data-float-button | data-float-button-action | data-float-button-trigger | data-position | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<FloatButton.Root>
  <FloatButton.Trigger>...</FloatButton.Trigger>
  <FloatButton.Action>...</FloatButton.Action>
</FloatButton.Root>
```

## ButtonGroup
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: action
Tags: button, group, toolbar, actions
Kind: simple
Root import: import { ButtonGroup } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { ButtonGroup } from '@dryui/ui/button-group'
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-button-group-hover-z-index, --dry-button-group-radius
Data attributes: data-button-group | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-size
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<ButtonGroup>Content</ButtonGroup>
```

## Chip
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: action
Tags: chip, pill, filter, selection, tag
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Chip } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Chip } from '@dryui/ui/chip'
Props: selected (boolean), Whether the current item is selected. | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | variant ('solid' | 'outline' | 'soft'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted solid, outline, soft, default 'soft' | color (ChipColor), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'gray' | size ('sm' | 'md'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, default 'sm' | href (string), Destination URL when the component renders as a link. | rel (string), Relationship between the current document and the linked resource. | target (string), Browsing context used for link navigation. | download (boolean | string), Requests download behavior when the component renders as a link. | type ('button' | 'submit' | 'reset'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted button, submit, reset, default 'button' | onclick ((event: MouseEvent) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Native props: Forwards native HTML attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-btn-accent, --dry-btn-accent-fg, --dry-btn-accent-stroke, --dry-btn-accent-weak, --dry-btn-bg, --dry-btn-border, --dry-btn-color
Data attributes: data-chip-color | data-chip-selected | data-chip-size | data-chip-variant | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.)
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Chip variant="soft" color="blue">Policy friendly</Chip>
```

## ChipGroup
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: action
Tags: chip, group, filters, selection
Kind: compound
Root import: import { ChipGroup } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { ChipGroup } from '@dryui/ui/chip-group'
Parts:
- ChipGroup.Root
  Props: size ('sm' | 'md'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, default 'sm' | type ('single' | 'multiple'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted single, multiple, default 'single' | value (string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default [], bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- ChipGroup.Item
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  ChipGroup.Root
    ChipGroup.Item
CSS variables: --dry-chip-group-font-size, --dry-chip-group-padding-x, --dry-chip-group-padding-y
Data attributes: data-chip-group | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-size | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<ChipGroup.Root type="multiple" bind:value={selectedFilters}>
  <ChipGroup.Item value="direct">Direct</ChipGroup.Item>
  <ChipGroup.Item value="flexible">Flexible</ChipGroup.Item>
  <ChipGroup.Item value="wifi">Wi-fi</ChipGroup.Item>
</ChipGroup.Root>
```

### input

## Input
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: input
Tags: form, text, input, field
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Input } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Input } from '@dryui/ui/input'
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Input density preset for compact, default, or spacious form layouts., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | variant ('default' | 'ghost'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, ghost, default 'default' | value (string), Bindable text value for controlled input usage., default '', bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | type (string), Native input type such as text, email, password, or search.
Native props: Forwards <input> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-input-bg, --dry-input-border, --dry-input-color, --dry-input-font-size, --dry-input-padding-x, --dry-input-padding-y
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-size | data-variant
Accessibility: Pair Input with a visible Label or an aria-label so the field purpose is announced. | Use native type, autocomplete, and name attributes for expected keyboard and form behavior.
Example:
```svelte
<Input type="email" bind:value={email} placeholder="you@example.com" />
```

## Textarea
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: input
Tags: form, text, multiline, textarea
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Textarea } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Textarea } from '@dryui/ui/textarea'
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false
Native props: Forwards native HTML attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-input-bg, --dry-input-border, --dry-input-font-size, --dry-input-padding-x, --dry-input-padding-y
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-size
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Textarea bind:value={message} placeholder="Write a message…" />
```

## PromptInput
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: input
Tags: prompt, input, chat, ai, textarea
Kind: simple
Root import: import { PromptInput } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { PromptInput } from '@dryui/ui/prompt-input'
Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '' | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default 'Type a message...' | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | submitLabel (string), default 'Send' | onpromptsubmit ((value: string) => void) | actions (Snippet)
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-btn-radius, --dry-prompt-input-bg, --dry-prompt-input-border, --dry-prompt-input-color, --dry-prompt-input-gap, --dry-prompt-input-padding, --dry-prompt-input-radius, --dry-prompt-input-textarea-min-height
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-part | data-prompt-actions | data-prompt-input | data-prompt-submit-label | data-prompt-textarea
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<PromptInput>Content</PromptInput>
```

## NumberInput
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: input
Tags: form, number, input, counter
Kind: simple
Root import: import { NumberInput } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { NumberInput } from '@dryui/ui/number-input'
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md', Adjusts input density and its default maximum width for compact counter-style fields. | value (number), Current controlled or bindable value., default 0, bindable | min (number), Minimum allowed value. | max (number), Maximum allowed value. | step (number), Step interval used when incrementing numeric values., default 1 | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false
Native props: Forwards <input> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-input-bg, --dry-input-border, --dry-input-color, --dry-input-font-size, --dry-input-padding-x, --dry-input-padding-y, --dry-input-radius
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-number-input-wrapper | data-size
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<NumberInput bind:value={quantity} min={0} max={100} step={1} size="sm" />
```

## Checkbox
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: input
Tags: form, toggle, boolean, check
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Checkbox } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Checkbox } from '@dryui/ui/checkbox'
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | checked (boolean), Current checked state for controlled or bindable usage., default false, bindable | indeterminate (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false
Native props: Forwards <input> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-checkbox-bg, --dry-checkbox-border, --dry-checkbox-check-color, --dry-checkbox-radius, --dry-checkbox-size
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-size | data-state
Accessibility: Pair the checkbox with visible text or an aria-label so its purpose is announced.
Example:
```svelte
<Checkbox bind:checked={agreed}>I agree to the terms</Checkbox>
```

## RadioGroup
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: input
Tags: form, radio, select, option, group
Kind: compound
Root import: import { RadioGroup } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { RadioGroup } from '@dryui/ui/radio-group'
Parts:
- RadioGroup.Root
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., bindable | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | required (boolean) | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- RadioGroup.Item
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <input> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  RadioGroup.Root
    RadioGroup.Item
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-radio-group-item | data-radio-group-root | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<RadioGroup.Root>
  <RadioGroup.Item>...</RadioGroup.Item>
</RadioGroup.Root>
```

## Slider
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: input
Tags: form, range, slider, value
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Slider } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Slider } from '@dryui/ui/slider'
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | variant (SliderVariant), Visual style preset for the component., default 'default' | valueLabel (Snippet<[{ value: number; percentage: number }]>) | value (number), Current controlled or bindable value., default 50, bindable | min (number), Minimum allowed value., default 0 | max (number), Maximum allowed value., default 100 | step (number), Step interval used when incrementing numeric values., default 1 | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal'
Native props: Forwards <input> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-slider-thumb-size, --dry-slider-track-height
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-size | data-variant
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Slider bind:value={volume} min={0} max={100} />
```

## InputGroup
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: input
Tags: input, field, affix, addon, control
Kind: compound
Root import: import { InputGroup } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { InputGroup } from '@dryui/ui/input-group'
Parts:
- InputGroup.Root
  Props: none
- InputGroup.Prefix
  Props: none
- InputGroup.Input
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default ''
  Native props: Forwards <input> attributes via rest props.
- InputGroup.Suffix
  Props: none
- InputGroup.Separator
  Props: none
- InputGroup.Action
  Props: none
- InputGroup.Select
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <select> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  InputGroup.Root
    InputGroup.Prefix
    InputGroup.Input
    InputGroup.Suffix
    InputGroup.Separator
    InputGroup.Action
    InputGroup.Select
CSS variables: --dry-input-group-bg, --dry-input-group-border, --dry-input-group-border-strong, --dry-input-group-color, --dry-input-group-font-size, --dry-input-group-gap, --dry-input-group-muted, --dry-input-group-padding-x, --dry-input-group-padding-y, --dry-input-group-radius, --dry-input-group-separator
Data attributes: data-affix-group | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-input-group-action | data-input-group-caret | data-input-group-input | data-input-group-inputWrap | data-input-group-prefix | data-input-group-root | data-input-group-select | data-input-group-selectWrap | data-input-group-separator | data-input-group-suffix | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-size
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<InputGroup.Root>
  <InputGroup.Prefix>...</InputGroup.Prefix>
  <InputGroup.Input>...</InputGroup.Input>
  <InputGroup.Suffix>...</InputGroup.Suffix>
  <InputGroup.Separator>...</InputGroup.Separator>
  <InputGroup.Action>...</InputGroup.Action>
  <InputGroup.Select>...</InputGroup.Select>
</InputGroup.Root>
```

## OptionPicker
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: input
Tags: picker, selection, options, tiles, preset, preview
Kind: compound
Root import: import { OptionPicker } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { OptionPicker } from '@dryui/ui/option-picker'
Parts:
- OptionPicker.Root
  Props: columns (1 | 2 | 3 | 4), accepted 1, 2, 3, 4
- OptionPicker.Item
  Props: layout ('inline' | 'stacked'), accepted inline, stacked, default 'inline' | size ('default' | 'compact' | 'visual'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted default, compact, visual, default 'default' | unavailable (boolean), default false
- OptionPicker.Preview
  Props: color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component. | shape ('circle' | 'rounded' | 'square' | 'pill'), accepted circle, rounded, square, pill, default 'rounded' | variant ('default' | 'preset' | 'font' | 'shape'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, preset, font, shape, default 'default' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <span> attributes via rest props.
- OptionPicker.Label
  Props: none
- OptionPicker.Description
  Props: none
- OptionPicker.Meta
  Props: none
Structure:
  OptionPicker.Root
    OptionPicker.Item
    OptionPicker.Preview
    OptionPicker.Label
    OptionPicker.Description
    OptionPicker.Meta
CSS variables: --dry-btn-align, --dry-btn-bg, --dry-btn-border, --dry-btn-color, --dry-btn-justify, --dry-btn-min-height, --dry-btn-padding-x, --dry-btn-padding-y, --dry-btn-radius, --dry-option-picker-description-column, --dry-option-picker-description-row, --dry-option-picker-label-column, --dry-option-picker-label-row, --dry-option-picker-meta-column, --dry-option-picker-meta-row, --dry-option-picker-preview-bg, --dry-option-picker-preview-border, --dry-option-picker-preview-color, --dry-option-picker-preview-column, --dry-option-picker-preview-radius, --dry-option-picker-preview-row, --dry-option-picker-preview-size
Data attributes: data-columns | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-layout | data-option-picker-description | data-option-picker-item | data-option-picker-label | data-option-picker-meta | data-option-picker-preview | data-option-picker-preview-shape | data-option-picker-root | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-shape | data-size | data-state | data-unavailable | data-value | data-variant
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<OptionPicker.Root>
  <OptionPicker.Item>...</OptionPicker.Item>
  <OptionPicker.Preview>...</OptionPicker.Preview>
  <OptionPicker.Label>...</OptionPicker.Label>
  <OptionPicker.Description>...</OptionPicker.Description>
  <OptionPicker.Meta>...</OptionPicker.Meta>
</OptionPicker.Root>
```

## Listbox
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: input
Tags: listbox, select, option, keyboard
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Listbox } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Listbox } from '@dryui/ui/listbox'
Parts:
- Listbox.Root
  Props: value (string | string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | multiple (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | onvaluechange ((value: string | string[]) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Listbox.Item
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Listbox.Root
    Listbox.Item
CSS variables: --dry-listbox-bg, --dry-listbox-border, --dry-listbox-item-hover-bg, --dry-listbox-item-padding-x, --dry-listbox-item-padding-y, --dry-listbox-item-radius, --dry-listbox-item-selected-bg, --dry-listbox-item-selected-border, --dry-listbox-item-selected-color, --dry-listbox-padding, --dry-listbox-radius
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-listbox-item | data-listbox-root | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-value
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Listbox.Root>
  <Listbox.Item>...</Listbox.Item>
</Listbox.Root>
```

## PinInput
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: input
Tags: form, pin, otp, code, verification
Kind: compound
Root import: import { PinInput } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { PinInput } from '@dryui/ui/pin-input'
Parts:
- PinInput.Root
  Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | variant ('outline' | 'flushed'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted outline, flushed, default 'outline' | value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | length (number), default 4 | mask (boolean), default false | type ('numeric' | 'alphanumeric'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted numeric, alphanumeric, default 'numeric' | pattern (RegExp) | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default '○' | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | oncomplete ((value: string) => void) | pasteTransformer ((text: string) => string) | blurOnComplete (boolean), default false | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | children (Snippet<[{ cells: PinInputCellState[] }]>), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- PinInput.Group
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- PinInput.Cell
  Props: cell (PinInputCellState), required | children (Snippet<[{ char: string | null; isActive: boolean; hasFakeCaret: boolean }]>), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- PinInput.Separator
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  PinInput.Root
    PinInput.Group
      PinInput.Cell
    PinInput.Separator
CSS variables: --dry-pin-bg, --dry-pin-border, --dry-pin-caret-color, --dry-pin-cell-bg, --dry-pin-cell-border, --dry-pin-cell-border-bottom, --dry-pin-cell-radius, --dry-pin-font-size, --dry-pin-radius, --dry-pin-separator-color, --dry-pin-size
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-complete | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-error | data-inactive | data-mask | data-pin-input-caret | data-pin-input-cell | data-pin-input-group | data-pin-input-hidden | data-pin-input-lg | data-pin-input-md | data-pin-input-placeholder | data-pin-input-root | data-pin-input-separator | data-pin-input-sm | data-state | data-variant
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<PinInput.Root bind:value={pin} length={6} oncomplete={handleVerify}>
  {#snippet children({ cells })}
    <PinInput.Group>
      {#each cells.slice(0, 3) as cell}
        <PinInput.Cell {cell} />
      {/each}
    </PinInput.Group>
    <PinInput.Separator />
    <PinInput.Group>
      {#each cells.slice(3) as cell}
        <PinInput.Cell {cell} />
      {/each}
    </PinInput.Group>
  {/snippet}
</PinInput.Root>
```

  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- SelectableTileGroup.Meta
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <span> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  SelectableTileGroup.Root
    SelectableTileGroup.Item
    SelectableTileGroup.Indicator
    SelectableTileGroup.Label
    SelectableTileGroup.Description
    SelectableTileGroup.Meta
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-state | data-value
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<SelectableTileGroup.Root>
  <SelectableTileGroup.Item>...</SelectableTileGroup.Item>
  <SelectableTileGroup.Indicator>...</SelectableTileGroup.Indicator>
  <SelectableTileGroup.Label>...</SelectableTileGroup.Label>
  <SelectableTileGroup.Description>...</SelectableTileGroup.Description>
  <SelectableTileGroup.Meta>...</SelectableTileGroup.Meta>
</SelectableTileGroup.Root>
```

### form

## Field
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: form
Tags: form, field, label, error, validation
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Field } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Field } from '@dryui/ui/field'

- Field.Root
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | error (string), default '' | required (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Field.Description
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <p> attributes via rest props.
- Field.Error
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <p> attributes via rest props.

## Fieldset
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: form
Tags: form, group, legend, settings
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Fieldset } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Fieldset } from '@dryui/ui/fieldset'
Parts:
- Fieldset.Root
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards native HTML attributes via rest props.
- Fieldset.Legend
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards native HTML attributes via rest props.
- Fieldset.Description
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <p> attributes via rest props.
- Fieldset.Content
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Fieldset.Root
    Fieldset.Legend
    Fieldset.Description
    Fieldset.Content
CSS variables: none

```svelte
<Fieldset.Root>
  <Fieldset.Legend>Notification preferences</Fieldset.Legend>
  <Fieldset.Description>Choose how release updates reach your team.</Fieldset.Description>
  <Fieldset.Content>
    <Checkbox checked={true}>Email digests</Checkbox>
    <Checkbox>SMS alerts</Checkbox>
  </Fieldset.Content>
</Fieldset.Root>
```

## Select
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: form
Tags: form, select, dropdown, option, choice, non-searchable
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Select } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Select } from '@dryui/ui/select'
Parts:
- Select.Root
  Props: open (boolean), Controls whether the select menu is currently expanded., bindable | value (string), Bindable selected value for the current option set., bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | name (string), Field name used during native form submission., Adds a hidden input so the selected value participates in native form submission. | options (Array<string | { value: string; label: string }>) | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
- Select.Trigger
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Select.Content
  Props: placement (Placement), default 'bottom-start' | offset (number), default 8 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Select.Item
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Select.Value
  Props: placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default ''
  Native props: Forwards <span> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Select.Root
    Select.Trigger
      Select.Value
    Select.Content
      Select.Item
CSS variables: --dry-btn-align, --dry-btn-justify, --dry-select-item-radius
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-indicator | data-placeholder | data-select-content | data-select-item | data-select-trigger | data-select-value | data-select-wrapper | data-state (Reflects whether the select surface is expanded or whether an option is active, depending on the part., values open, closed, checked, unchecked) | data-value
Accessibility: Provide surrounding field context and a name when the selected value needs to submit with a form.
Example:
```svelte
<Select.Root bind:value={selected} bind:open={selectOpen} name="selection">
  <Select.Trigger>
    <Select.Value placeholder="Choose…" />
  </Select.Trigger>
  <Select.Content>
    <Select.Item value="a">Alpha</Select.Item>
    <Select.Item value="b">Beta</Select.Item>
  </Select.Content>
</Select.Root>
```

## MultiSelectCombobox
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: form
Tags: form, multiselect, combobox, autocomplete, tokens, chips
Kind: compound
Root import: import { MultiSelectCombobox } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { MultiSelectCombobox } from '@dryui/ui/multi-select-combobox'
Parts:
- MultiSelectCombobox.Root
  Props: value (string[]), Current controlled or bindable value. | query (string) | open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open. | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | maxSelections (number) | onvaluechange ((value: string[]) => void) | onquerychange ((query: string) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- MultiSelectCombobox.Input
  Props: placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default ''
  Native props: Forwards <input> attributes via rest props.
- MultiSelectCombobox.Content
  Props: placement (Placement), default 'bottom-start' | offset (number), default 4 | loading (boolean), default false | loadingContent (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- MultiSelectCombobox.Group
  Props: label (string), Visible label text shown for the control or item., required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- MultiSelectCombobox.Item
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | textValue (string) | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | icon (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- MultiSelectCombobox.Empty
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- MultiSelectCombobox.SelectionList
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- MultiSelectCombobox.SelectionItem
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <span> attributes via rest props.
- MultiSelectCombobox.SelectionRemove
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | label (string | undefined), Visible label text shown for the control or item.
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  MultiSelectCombobox.Root
    MultiSelectCombobox.SelectionList
      MultiSelectCombobox.SelectionItem
        MultiSelectCombobox.SelectionRemove
    MultiSelectCombobox.Input
    MultiSelectCombobox.Content
      MultiSelectCombobox.Item
CSS variables: --dry-btn-font-size, --dry-btn-padding-x, --dry-btn-padding-y, --dry-btn-radius, --dry-multi-select-item-radius
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-empty | data-highlighted | data-multi-select-content | data-multi-select-empty | data-multi-select-group | data-multi-select-input | data-multi-select-item | data-multi-select-root | data-multi-select-selection-item | data-multi-select-selection-list | data-multi-select-wrapper | data-part | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-state | data-text-value | data-value
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<MultiSelectCombobox.Root bind:value={selectedFrameworks} bind:query={frameworkQuery} name="frameworks">
  <MultiSelectCombobox.SelectionList>
    {#each selectedFrameworks as framework}
      <MultiSelectCombobox.SelectionItem value={framework}>
        {framework}
        <MultiSelectCombobox.SelectionRemove value={framework} />
      </MultiSelectCombobox.SelectionItem>
    {/each}
  </MultiSelectCombobox.SelectionList>
  <MultiSelectCombobox.Input placeholder="Search frameworks..." />
  <MultiSelectCombobox.Content>
    <MultiSelectCombobox.Item value="svelte">Svelte</MultiSelectCombobox.Item>
    <MultiSelectCombobox.Item value="react">React</MultiSelectCombobox.Item>
  </MultiSelectCombobox.Content>
</MultiSelectCombobox.Root>
```

  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- SegmentedControl.Item
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.

  SegmentedControl.Root
    SegmentedControl.Item

## Combobox
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: form
Tags: form, search, autocomplete, filter, select, typeahead, searchable-select
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Combobox } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Combobox } from '@dryui/ui/combobox'
Parts:
- Combobox.Root
  Props: open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., bindable | value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | name (string), Field name used during native form submission., Adds a hidden input so the selected value participates in native form submission. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
- Combobox.Input
  Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default ''
  Native props: Forwards <input> attributes via rest props.
- Combobox.Content
  Props: placement (Placement), default 'bottom-start' | offset (number), default 4 | loading (boolean), default false | loadingContent (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Combobox.Item
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | index (number), required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | icon (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Combobox.Empty
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Combobox.Group
  Props: label (string), Visible label text shown for the control or item., required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Combobox.Root
    Combobox.Input
    Combobox.Content
      Combobox.Item
CSS variables: --dry-combobox-bg, --dry-combobox-border, --dry-combobox-color, --dry-combobox-font-size, --dry-combobox-item-radius, --dry-combobox-padding-x, --dry-combobox-padding-y
Data attributes: data-combobox-content | data-combobox-empty | data-combobox-group | data-combobox-input | data-combobox-item | data-combobox-wrapper | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-highlighted | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-part | data-size | data-state | data-value
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Combobox.Root bind:value={selectedFramework} name="framework">
  <Combobox.Input placeholder="Search frameworks..." />
  <Combobox.Content>
    <Combobox.Item value="svelte" index={0}>Svelte</Combobox.Item>
    <Combobox.Item value="react" index={1}>React</Combobox.Item>
  </Combobox.Content>
</Combobox.Root>
```

## DateField
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: form
Tags: date, input, field, segment, locale, form, date-input
Kind: compound
Root import: import { DateField } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { DateField } from '@dryui/ui/date-field'
Parts:
- DateField.Root
  Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg | value (Date | null), Current controlled or bindable value., bindable | name (string), Field name used during native form submission., Adds a hidden input so the selected date participates in native form submission as YYYY-MM-DD. | locale (string) | min (Date | null), Minimum allowed value. | max (Date | null), Maximum allowed value. | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- DateField.Segment
  Props: type ('month' | 'day' | 'year'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted month, day, year, required
  Native props: Forwards <span> attributes via rest props.
- DateField.Separator
  Props: separator (string)
  Native props: Forwards <span> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  DateField.Root
    DateField.Segment
    DateField.Separator
CSS variables: --dry-df-bg, --dry-df-border, --dry-df-color, --dry-df-font-size, --dry-df-padding-x, --dry-df-padding-y, --dry-df-radius
Data attributes: data-df-root | data-df-segment | data-df-separator | data-df-wrapper | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-placeholder | data-segment | data-separator | data-size
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<DateField.Root bind:value={departureDate} name="departureDate">
  <DateField.Segment type="month" />
  <DateField.Separator />
  <DateField.Segment type="day" />
  <DateField.Separator />
  <DateField.Segment type="year" />
</DateField.Root>
```

  Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered. | children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.

  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.

### layout

## Container
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: layout
Tags: wrapper, center, max-width
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Container } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Container } from '@dryui/ui/container'
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | 'full'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, xl, full, default 'lg', Preset container width, not an arbitrary CSS length. | padding (boolean), default true | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.

Data attributes: data-padding | data-size
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte

  <p>Centered content</p>
</Container>
```

## Separator
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: layout
Tags: divider, line, hr, separator
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Separator } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Separator } from '@dryui/ui/separator'
Props: orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | variant ('weak' | 'strong'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted weak, strong, default 'weak' | decorative (boolean), default true
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-separator-color, --dry-separator-size, --dry-separator-spacing
Data attributes: data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-variant
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Separator />
```

## Spacer

Tags: space, gap, margin, padding
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Spacer } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Spacer } from '@dryui/ui/spacer'
Props: size ('xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl | axis ('vertical' | 'horizontal'), accepted vertical, horizontal, default 'vertical'
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-axis | data-size
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Spacer size="lg" />
```

## Splitter
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: layout
Tags: split, resize, panel, drag
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Splitter } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Splitter } from '@dryui/ui/splitter'
Parts:
- Splitter.Root
  Props: orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | sizes (number[]), default $bindable([50 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Splitter.Panel
  Props: index (number), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Splitter.Handle
  Props: index (number), required | children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Splitter.Root
    Splitter.Panel
    Splitter.Handle
CSS variables: --dry-splitter-handle-z-index

Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Splitter.Root>
  <Splitter.Panel>...</Splitter.Panel>
  <Splitter.Handle>...</Splitter.Handle>
</Splitter.Root>
```

## Aurora
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: layout
Tags: background, gradient, ambient, shader-like, hero
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Aurora } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Aurora } from '@dryui/ui/aurora'
Props: palette (AuroraPalette), default 'cosmic' | speed (AuroraSpeed), default 'normal' | motion (AuroraMotion), default 'auto' | intensity (number), default 80 | waviness (number), default 50 | colorSpace (AuroraColorSpace), default 'srgb' | blendMode (BlendMode) | layerOpacity (number) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-aurora-angle, --dry-aurora-color-1, --dry-aurora-color-2, --dry-aurora-color-3, --dry-aurora-duration, --dry-aurora-intensity, --dry-aurora-shift, --dry-aurora-surface, --dry-aurora-waviness
Data attributes: data-animated | data-aurora | data-aurora-backdrop | data-aurora-content | data-aurora-layer | data-color-space | data-layer | data-palette | data-reduced-motion
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Aurora palette="ocean">
  <Card.Root>
    <Card.Content>Ambient backgrounds stay native and no-dependency.</Card.Content>
  </Card.Root>
</Aurora>
```

## Noise
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: layout
Tags: texture, grain, surface, overlay, shader-like
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Noise } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Noise } from '@dryui/ui/noise'
Props: opacity (number), default 0.22 | blend (NoiseBlendMode), default 'overlay' | animated (boolean), default false | grain (NoiseGrain), default 'medium' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-noise-blend, --dry-noise-opacity, --dry-noise-pattern
Data attributes: data-animated | data-grain | data-noise | data-noise-content | data-noise-texture | data-reduced-motion
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Noise opacity={0.12} blend="soft-light">
  <Card.Root>
    <Card.Content>Grain adds atmosphere without loading an external texture.</Card.Content>
  </Card.Root>
</Noise>
```

Tags: page-header, title, metadata, actions, eyebrow

- PageHeader.Root

- PageHeader.Eyebrow

  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- PageHeader.Title
  Props: level (1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6), Semantic heading level to render., accepted 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, default 2 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <h*> attributes via rest props.
- PageHeader.Description
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <p> attributes via rest props.
- PageHeader.Meta
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.

    PageHeader.Description
    PageHeader.Meta

### navigation

## Tabs
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: navigation
Tags: tabs, nav, switch, panel
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Tabs } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Tabs } from '@dryui/ui/tabs'
Parts:
- Tabs.Root
  Props: value (string), Bindable current tab value for controlled tab interfaces., default '' | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | activationMode ('automatic' | 'manual'), accepted automatic, manual, default 'automatic' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Tabs.List
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Tabs.Trigger
  Props: value (string), Tab identifier that activates the matching content panel., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- Tabs.Content
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Tabs.Root
    Tabs.List
      Tabs.Trigger
    Tabs.Content
CSS variables: --dry-tabs-trigger-active-border-bottom-color, --dry-tabs-trigger-active-border-right-color, --dry-tabs-trigger-border-bottom, --dry-tabs-trigger-border-right
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-state (Reflects whether the tab trigger or panel is active., values active, inactive) | data-tabs-content | data-tabs-list | data-tabs-root
Accessibility: Give each Tabs.Trigger concise, descriptive text so keyboard and screen-reader users can scan options quickly. | Keep Tabs.List and Tabs.Content as siblings under Tabs.Root to preserve roving focus and aria wiring.
Example:
```svelte
<Tabs.Root bind:value={activeTab}>
  <Tabs.List>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="one">Tab 1</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="two">Tab 2</Tabs.Trigger>
  </Tabs.List>
  <Tabs.Content value="one">First panel</Tabs.Content>
  <Tabs.Content value="two">Second panel</Tabs.Content>
</Tabs.Root>
```

## Breadcrumb
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: navigation
Tags: nav, path, hierarchy, trail
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Breadcrumb } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Breadcrumb } from '@dryui/ui/breadcrumb'
Parts:
- Breadcrumb.Root
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
- Breadcrumb.List
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <ol> attributes via rest props.
- Breadcrumb.Item
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <li> attributes via rest props.
- Breadcrumb.Link
  Props: href (string), Destination URL when the component renders as a link. | current (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <a> attributes via rest props.
- Breadcrumb.Separator
  Props: children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <li> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Breadcrumb.Root
    Breadcrumb.List
      Breadcrumb.Item
        Breadcrumb.Link
      Breadcrumb.Separator
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-breadcrumb | data-breadcrumb-current | data-breadcrumb-item | data-breadcrumb-link | data-breadcrumb-list | data-breadcrumb-separator
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Breadcrumb.Root>
  <Breadcrumb.List>
    <Breadcrumb.Item>
      <Breadcrumb.Link href="/">Home</Breadcrumb.Link>
    </Breadcrumb.Item>
    <Breadcrumb.Separator />
    <Breadcrumb.Item>
      <Breadcrumb.Link href="/docs">Docs</Breadcrumb.Link>
    </Breadcrumb.Item>
    <Breadcrumb.Separator />
    <Breadcrumb.Item>
      <Breadcrumb.Link current>Current</Breadcrumb.Link>
    </Breadcrumb.Item>
  </Breadcrumb.List>
</Breadcrumb.Root>
```

## Pagination
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: navigation
Tags: nav, pages, paging, navigation
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Pagination } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Pagination } from '@dryui/ui/pagination'
Parts:
- Pagination.Root
  Props: page (number), default 1 | totalPages (number), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
- Pagination.Content
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <ul> attributes via rest props.
- Pagination.Item
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <li> attributes via rest props.
- Pagination.Previous
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- Pagination.Next
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- Pagination.Link
  Props: page (number), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- Pagination.Ellipsis
  Props: none
  Native props: Forwards <span> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Pagination.Root
    Pagination.Content
    Pagination.Item
    Pagination.Previous
    Pagination.Next
    Pagination.Link
    Pagination.Ellipsis
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-pagination-content | data-pagination-ellipsis | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Pagination.Root>
  <Pagination.Content>...</Pagination.Content>
  <Pagination.Item>...</Pagination.Item>
  <Pagination.Previous>...</Pagination.Previous>
  <Pagination.Next>...</Pagination.Next>
  <Pagination.Link>...</Pagination.Link>
  <Pagination.Ellipsis>...</Pagination.Ellipsis>
</Pagination.Root>
```

## Stepper
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: navigation
Tags: steps, wizard, progress, workflow
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Stepper } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Stepper } from '@dryui/ui/stepper'
Parts:
- Stepper.Root
  Props: activeStep (number), Current step index for a controlled multi-step flow., default 0, bindable, Bindable current step index for controlled multi-step flows. | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Stepper.List
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <ol> attributes via rest props.
- Stepper.Step
  Props: step (number), Step interval used when incrementing numeric values., required | clickable (boolean) | error (boolean) | onclick ((index: number) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <li> attributes via rest props.
- Stepper.Separator
  Props: step (number), Step interval used when incrementing numeric values., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Stepper.Root
    Stepper.List
      Stepper.Step
      Stepper.Separator
CSS variables: --dry-stepper-connector-width
Data attributes: data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Stepper.Root bind:activeStep={activeStep}>
  <Stepper.List>
    <Stepper.Step step={0}>Account</Stepper.Step>
    <Stepper.Separator step={0} />
    <Stepper.Step step={1}>Profile</Stepper.Step>
    <Stepper.Separator step={1} />
    <Stepper.Step step={2}>Review</Stepper.Step>
  </Stepper.List>
</Stepper.Root>
```

  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.

Tags: navigation, menu, flyout, mega-menu

- NavigationMenu.Root
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
- NavigationMenu.List
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <ul> attributes via rest props.
- NavigationMenu.Item
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
- NavigationMenu.Trigger
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- NavigationMenu.Content
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- NavigationMenu.Link
  Props: active (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <a> attributes via rest props.

    NavigationMenu.List
    NavigationMenu.Item
    NavigationMenu.Trigger
    NavigationMenu.Content
    NavigationMenu.Link

Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-nav-menu | data-nav-menu-content | data-nav-menu-link | data-nav-menu-list | data-nav-menu-trigger | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte

  <NavigationMenu.Trigger>...</NavigationMenu.Trigger>
```

## Sidebar
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: navigation
Tags: sidebar, navigation, panel, collapsible
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Sidebar } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Sidebar } from '@dryui/ui/sidebar'
Parts:
- Sidebar.Root
  Props: collapsed (boolean), default false, bindable | side ('left' | 'right'), Preferred side for overlay placement., accepted left, right, default 'left' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
- Sidebar.Header
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Sidebar.Content
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Sidebar.Footer
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Sidebar.Group
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Sidebar.GroupLabel
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Sidebar.Item
  Props: active (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <a> attributes via rest props.
- Sidebar.Trigger
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Sidebar.Root
    Sidebar.Header
    Sidebar.Content
    Sidebar.Footer
    Sidebar.Group
    Sidebar.GroupLabel
    Sidebar.Item
    Sidebar.Trigger
CSS variables: --dry-sidebar-content-padding, --dry-sidebar-item-padding-x
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-collapsed | data-side (Indicates the resolved placement side for the overlay surface., values top, right, bottom, left) | data-sidebar | data-sidebar-content | data-sidebar-footer | data-sidebar-group | data-sidebar-group-label | data-sidebar-header | data-sidebar-item | data-sidebar-trigger | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Sidebar.Root>
  <Sidebar.Header>...</Sidebar.Header>
  <Sidebar.Content>...</Sidebar.Content>
  <Sidebar.Footer>...</Sidebar.Footer>
  <Sidebar.Group>...</Sidebar.Group>
  <Sidebar.GroupLabel>...</Sidebar.GroupLabel>
  <Sidebar.Item>...</Sidebar.Item>
  <Sidebar.Trigger>...</Sidebar.Trigger>
</Sidebar.Root>
```

## TableOfContents
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: navigation
Tags: toc, navigation, headings, scroll-spy
Kind: compound
Root import: import { TableOfContents } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { TableOfContents } from '@dryui/ui/table-of-contents'
Parts:
- TableOfContents.Root
  Props: selector (string), default 'main' | headingSelector (string), default 'h2 | rootMargin (string), default '0px 0px -80% 0px' | autoId (boolean), default true | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
- TableOfContents.List
  Props: none
  Native props: Forwards <ol> attributes via rest props.
- TableOfContents.Item
  Props: heading (import('./context.svelte.js').TocHeading), required | children (Snippet<[{ heading: import('./context.svelte.js').TocHeading; active: boolean }]>), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <li> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  TableOfContents.Root
    TableOfContents.List
    TableOfContents.Item
CSS variables: --dry-toc-active-color, --dry-toc-bg, --dry-toc-border, --dry-toc-indent, --dry-toc-item-padding-x, --dry-toc-item-padding-y, --dry-toc-muted-color, --dry-toc-padding, --dry-toc-radius, --dry-toc-shadow
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-level | data-part
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<TableOfContents.Root>
  <TableOfContents.List>...</TableOfContents.List>
  <TableOfContents.Item>...</TableOfContents.Item>
</TableOfContents.Root>
```

## Link
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: navigation
Tags: link, anchor, href, external
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Link } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Link } from '@dryui/ui/link'
Props: underline ('always' | 'hover' | 'none'), accepted always, hover, none, default 'always' | external (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Native props: Forwards <a> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-link-hover-color
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-underline
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Link>Content</Link>
```

## MegaMenu
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: navigation
Tags: menu, mega-menu, navigation, dropdown, panel, flyout
Kind: compound
Root import: import { MegaMenu } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { MegaMenu } from '@dryui/ui/mega-menu'
Parts:
- MegaMenu.Root
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
- MegaMenu.Item
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- MegaMenu.Trigger
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- MegaMenu.Panel
  Props: fullWidth (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- MegaMenu.Column
  Props: title (string), Primary heading or label text. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- MegaMenu.Link
  Props: href (string), Destination URL when the component renders as a link. | rel (string), Relationship between the current document and the linked resource. | target (string), Browsing context used for link navigation. | download (boolean | string), Requests download behavior when the component renders as a link. | type ('button' | 'submit' | 'reset'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted button, submit, reset, default 'button' | icon (Snippet) | description (Snippet), Supporting copy that explains the current control or section. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  MegaMenu.Root
    MegaMenu.Trigger
    MegaMenu.Panel
      MegaMenu.Column
        MegaMenu.Link
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-full-width | data-mega-menu-column | data-mega-menu-item | data-mega-menu-link | data-mega-menu-panel | data-mega-menu-root | data-mega-menu-trigger | data-part | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<MegaMenu.Root>
  <MegaMenu.Trigger>Products</MegaMenu.Trigger>
  <MegaMenu.Panel>
    <MegaMenu.Column title="Platform">
      <MegaMenu.Link href="/analytics">Analytics</MegaMenu.Link>
      <MegaMenu.Link href="/automation">Automation</MegaMenu.Link>
    </MegaMenu.Column>
  </MegaMenu.Panel>
</MegaMenu.Root>
```

### overlay

## Dialog
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: overlay
Tags: modal, overlay, dialog, popup
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Dialog } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Dialog } from '@dryui/ui/dialog'
Parts:
- Dialog.Root
  Props: open (boolean), Controls whether the dialog is currently shown., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
- Dialog.Trigger
  Props: children (Snippet), Interactive element that opens the dialog., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Dialog.Content
  Props: children (Snippet), Main dialog surface content rendered inside the modal., required
  Native props: Forwards native HTML attributes via rest props.
- Dialog.Overlay
  Props: none
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Dialog.Header
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Dialog.Body
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Dialog.Footer
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Dialog.Close
  Props: children (Snippet), Label or content rendered inside the dismiss control., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Dialog.Root
    Dialog.Trigger
    Dialog.Content
      Dialog.Header
      Dialog.Footer
CSS variables: --dry-dialog-border, --dry-dialog-padding, --dry-radius-nested, --dry-section-border, --dry-section-padding
Data attributes: data-dialog-body | data-dialog-content | data-dialog-footer | data-dialog-header | data-dialog-panel | data-dialog-trigger | data-state (Reflects whether the dialog is open or closed., values open, closed)
Accessibility: Always provide a clear heading so the dialog context is announced when it opens. | Ensure there is an obvious close path for both keyboard and pointer users.
Example:
```svelte
<Dialog.Root bind:open={showDialog}>
  <Dialog.Trigger>
    <Button>Open Dialog</Button>
  </Dialog.Trigger>
  <Dialog.Content>
    <Dialog.Header>Confirm</Dialog.Header>
    <p>Are you sure?</p>
    <Dialog.Footer>
      <Button variant="outline" onclick={() => showDialog = false}>Cancel</Button>
      <Button variant="solid" onclick={handleConfirm}>Confirm</Button>
    </Dialog.Footer>
  </Dialog.Content>
</Dialog.Root>
```

## AlertDialog
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: overlay
Tags: modal, confirm, dialog, destructive
Kind: compound
Root import: import { AlertDialog } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { AlertDialog } from '@dryui/ui/alert-dialog'
Parts:
- AlertDialog.Root
  Props: open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
- AlertDialog.Trigger
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- AlertDialog.Content
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards native HTML attributes via rest props.
- AlertDialog.Overlay
  Props: none
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- AlertDialog.Header
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- AlertDialog.Body
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- AlertDialog.Footer
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- AlertDialog.Action
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- AlertDialog.Cancel
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  AlertDialog.Root
    AlertDialog.Trigger
    AlertDialog.Content
    AlertDialog.Overlay
    AlertDialog.Header
    AlertDialog.Body
    AlertDialog.Footer
    AlertDialog.Action
    AlertDialog.Cancel
CSS variables: --dry-dialog-bg, --dry-dialog-border, --dry-dialog-max-width, --dry-dialog-padding, --dry-dialog-radius, --dry-dialog-shadow, --dry-section-border, --dry-section-padding
Data attributes: data-alert-dialog-body | data-alert-dialog-content | data-alert-dialog-footer | data-alert-dialog-header | data-alert-dialog-overlay | data-alert-dialog-trigger | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
