```svelte
  <AlertDialog.Trigger>...</AlertDialog.Trigger>
  <AlertDialog.Content>...</AlertDialog.Content>
  <AlertDialog.Overlay>...</AlertDialog.Overlay>
  <AlertDialog.Header>...</AlertDialog.Header>
  <AlertDialog.Body>...</AlertDialog.Body>
  <AlertDialog.Footer>...</AlertDialog.Footer>
  <AlertDialog.Action>...</AlertDialog.Action>
  <AlertDialog.Cancel>...</AlertDialog.Cancel>
</AlertDialog.Root>
```

## Drawer
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: overlay
Tags: modal, panel, slide, sidebar
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Drawer } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Drawer } from '@dryui/ui/drawer'
Parts:
- Drawer.Root
  Props: open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false | side ('top' | 'right' | 'bottom' | 'left'), Preferred side for overlay placement., accepted top, right, bottom, left, default 'right' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
- Drawer.Trigger
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Drawer.Content
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards native HTML attributes via rest props.
- Drawer.Overlay
  Props: none
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Drawer.Header
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Drawer.Body
  Props: padding (boolean), default true | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Drawer.Footer
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Drawer.Close
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Drawer.Root
    Drawer.Trigger
    Drawer.Content
      Drawer.Header
CSS variables: --dry-drawer-bg, --dry-drawer-border, --dry-drawer-size, --dry-sidebar-bg, --dry-sidebar-border, --dry-sidebar-radius, --dry-sidebar-shadow
Data attributes: data-drawer-body | data-drawer-content | data-drawer-footer | data-drawer-header | data-drawer-overlay | data-drawer-panel | data-drawer-trigger | data-no-padding | data-side (Indicates the resolved placement side for the overlay surface., values top, right, bottom, left) | data-state (Reflects whether the drawer is open or closed., values open, closed)
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Drawer.Root bind:open={drawerOpen}>
  <Drawer.Trigger>
    <Button>Open Drawer</Button>
  </Drawer.Trigger>
  <Drawer.Content side="right">
    <Drawer.Header>Settings</Drawer.Header>
    <p>Drawer body content.</p>
  </Drawer.Content>
</Drawer.Root>
```

## Popover
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: overlay
Tags: popup, floating, tooltip, popover
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Popover } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Popover } from '@dryui/ui/popover'
Parts:
- Popover.Root
  Props: open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false, bindable | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
- Popover.Trigger
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Popover.Content
  Props: placement (Placement), default 'bottom' | offset (number), default 8 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Popover.Root
    Popover.Trigger
    Popover.Content
CSS variables: --dry-popover-bg, --dry-popover-border, --dry-popover-padding, --dry-popover-radius, --dry-popover-shadow, --dry-radius-nested
Data attributes: data-popover-content | data-popover-trigger | data-state (Reflects whether the popover is open or closed., values open, closed)
Accessibility: Avoid placing essential actions in hover-only or transient content; keyboard users must be able to reopen the popover.
Example:
```svelte
<Popover.Root bind:open={popoverOpen}>
  <Popover.Trigger>
    <Button variant="outline">Info</Button>
  </Popover.Trigger>
  <Popover.Content>
    <p>Popover details here.</p>
  </Popover.Content>
</Popover.Root>
```

## Tooltip
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: overlay
Tags: hover, info, tooltip, hint
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Tooltip } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Tooltip } from '@dryui/ui/tooltip'
Parts:
- Tooltip.Root
  Props: openDelay (number), default 700 | closeDelay (number), default 300 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
- Tooltip.Trigger
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <span> attributes via rest props.
- Tooltip.Content
  Props: placement (Placement), default 'top' | offset (number), default 8 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Tooltip.Root
    Tooltip.Trigger
    Tooltip.Content
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-state | data-tooltip-content | data-tooltip-trigger
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Tooltip.Root>
  <Tooltip.Trigger>
    <Button variant="ghost">Hover me</Button>
  </Tooltip.Trigger>
  <Tooltip.Content>Extra information</Tooltip.Content>
</Tooltip.Root>
```

## DropdownMenu
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: overlay
Tags: menu, dropdown, actions, popover
Kind: compound
Root import: import { DropdownMenu } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { DropdownMenu } from '@dryui/ui/dropdown-menu'
Parts:
- DropdownMenu.Root
  Props: open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
- DropdownMenu.Trigger
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- DropdownMenu.Content
  Props: placement (Placement), default 'bottom-start' | offset (number), default 8 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- DropdownMenu.Item
  Props: disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- DropdownMenu.Separator
  Props: none
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- DropdownMenu.Group
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- DropdownMenu.Label
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  DropdownMenu.Root
    DropdownMenu.Trigger
    DropdownMenu.Content
      DropdownMenu.Item
CSS variables: --dry-radius-nested
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-dropdown-menu-content | data-dropdown-menu-item | data-dropdown-menu-label | data-dropdown-menu-separator | data-dropdown-trigger-wrap | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<DropdownMenu.Root>
  <DropdownMenu.Trigger>
    <Button variant="ghost">Menu</Button>
  </DropdownMenu.Trigger>
  <DropdownMenu.Content>
    <DropdownMenu.Item onclick={handleEdit}>Edit</DropdownMenu.Item>
    <DropdownMenu.Item onclick={handleDelete}>Delete</DropdownMenu.Item>
  </DropdownMenu.Content>
</DropdownMenu.Root>
```

## CommandPalette
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: overlay
Tags: modal, search, command, shortcut, palette
Kind: compound
Root import: import { CommandPalette } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { CommandPalette } from '@dryui/ui/command-palette'
Parts:
- CommandPalette.Root
  Props: open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards native HTML attributes via rest props.
- CommandPalette.Input
  Props: placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered.
  Native props: Forwards <input> attributes via rest props.
- CommandPalette.List
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- CommandPalette.Group
  Props: heading (string) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- CommandPalette.Item
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | onSelect (() => void), Callback fired when the item is selected. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- CommandPalette.Empty
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- CommandPalette.Separator
  Props: none
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  CommandPalette.Root
    CommandPalette.Input
    CommandPalette.List
    CommandPalette.Group
    CommandPalette.Item
    CommandPalette.Empty
    CommandPalette.Separator
CSS variables: --dry-cmd-bg, --dry-cmd-border, --dry-cmd-item-radius, --dry-cmd-max-width, --dry-cmd-radius, --dry-cmd-shadow
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-command-palette-empty | data-command-palette-group | data-command-palette-group-heading | data-command-palette-input | data-command-palette-item | data-command-palette-list | data-command-palette-root | data-command-palette-separator | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-state (Reflects whether the command palette dialog is open or closed., values open, closed) | data-value
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<CommandPalette.Root>
  <CommandPalette.Input>...</CommandPalette.Input>
  <CommandPalette.List>...</CommandPalette.List>
  <CommandPalette.Group>...</CommandPalette.Group>
  <CommandPalette.Item>...</CommandPalette.Item>
  <CommandPalette.Empty>...</CommandPalette.Empty>
  <CommandPalette.Separator>...</CommandPalette.Separator>
</CommandPalette.Root>
```

## HoverCard
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: overlay
Tags: hover, card, preview, popup
Kind: compound
Root import: import { HoverCard } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { HoverCard } from '@dryui/ui/hover-card'
Parts:
- HoverCard.Root
  Props: openDelay (number), default 700 | closeDelay (number), default 300 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
- HoverCard.Trigger
  Props: href (string), Destination URL when the component renders as a link. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards native HTML attributes via rest props.
- HoverCard.Content
  Props: placement (Placement), default 'bottom' | offset (number), default 8 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  HoverCard.Root
    HoverCard.Trigger
    HoverCard.Content
CSS variables: --dry-hover-card-bg, --dry-hover-card-border, --dry-hover-card-max-width, --dry-hover-card-min-width, --dry-hover-card-padding, --dry-hover-card-radius, --dry-hover-card-shadow
Data attributes: data-hover-card-content | data-hover-card-trigger | data-state
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<HoverCard.Root>
  <HoverCard.Trigger>...</HoverCard.Trigger>
  <HoverCard.Content>...</HoverCard.Content>
</HoverCard.Root>
```

## NotificationCenter
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: overlay
Tags: notification, bell, alerts, inbox, popover, unread
Kind: compound
Root import: import { NotificationCenter } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { NotificationCenter } from '@dryui/ui/notification-center'
Parts:
- NotificationCenter.Root
  Props: items (import('./context.svelte.js').NotificationItem[]), default $bindable<NotificationItem[]>([]), bindable | open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false, bindable | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
- NotificationCenter.Trigger
  Props: children (Snippet<[{ unreadCount: number }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- NotificationCenter.Panel
  Props: placement (Placement), default 'bottom-end' | offset (number), default 8 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- NotificationCenter.Item
  Props: id (string), Unique HTML id used for labels, aria relationships, or targeted styling., required | read (boolean), default false | timestamp (Date) | variant ('info' | 'warning' | 'critical'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted info, warning, critical | action (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- NotificationCenter.Group
  Props: label (string), Visible label text shown for the control or item., required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  NotificationCenter.Root
    NotificationCenter.Trigger
    NotificationCenter.Panel
      NotificationCenter.Group
        NotificationCenter.Item
CSS variables: --dry-nc-item-padding, --dry-nc-panel-width, --dry-nc-unread-bg
Data attributes: data-id | data-notification-center-group | data-notification-center-item | data-notification-center-panel | data-notification-center-root | data-notification-center-trigger | data-part | data-state | data-variant
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<NotificationCenter.Root bind:items={notifications} bind:open={panelOpen}>
  <NotificationCenter.Trigger>
    {#snippet children({ unreadCount })}
      <Button>Notifications ({unreadCount})</Button>
    {/snippet}
  </NotificationCenter.Trigger>
  <NotificationCenter.Panel>
    <NotificationCenter.Group label="Today">
      <NotificationCenter.Item id="1" variant="info">New deployment complete</NotificationCenter.Item>
    </NotificationCenter.Group>
  </NotificationCenter.Panel>
</NotificationCenter.Root>
```

### display

## Card
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: surface, container, content, panel
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Card } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Card } from '@dryui/ui/card'
Parts:
- Card.Root
  Props: as ('div' | 'a' | 'button'), Underlying HTML element to render for the component., accepted div, a, button, default 'div' | selected (boolean), Applies selected-state styling for interactive card surfaces. | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | orientation ('vertical' | 'horizontal'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted vertical, horizontal | variant ('default' | 'elevated' | 'interactive'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, elevated, interactive, default 'default' | size ('default' | 'sm'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted default, sm, default 'default' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
- Card.Header
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Card.Content
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | noPadding (boolean), default false
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Card.Footer
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Card.Root
    Card.Header
    Card.Content
    Card.Footer
CSS variables: --dry-card-bg, --dry-card-padding, --dry-card-radius, --dry-card-selected-ring-color, --dry-card-shadow, --dry-radius-nested
Data attributes: data-card | data-card-content | data-card-footer | data-card-header | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-no-padding | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-size | data-variant
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Card.Root>
  <Card.Header>Title</Card.Header>
  <Card.Content>
    <p>Card body content goes here.</p>
  </Card.Content>
  <Card.Footer>
    <Button variant="solid">Action</Button>
  </Card.Footer>
</Card.Root>
```

## Accordion
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: disclosure, collapse, expand, faq
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Accordion } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Accordion } from '@dryui/ui/accordion'
Parts:
- Accordion.Root
  Props: type ('single' | 'multiple'), Accordion behavior mode for single or multiple expanded items., accepted single, multiple, default 'single' | value (string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default [] | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'vertical' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Accordion.Item
  Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Accordion.Trigger
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- Accordion.Content
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Accordion.Root
    Accordion.Item
      Accordion.Trigger
      Accordion.Content
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-accordion | data-accordion-content | data-accordion-content-inner | data-accordion-item | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-indicator | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-state (Reflects whether the current accordion item is expanded or collapsed., values open, closed)
Accessibility: Use descriptive trigger text so the hidden content is understandable before expansion. | Keep each trigger paired with its matching content so keyboard and screen-reader relationships stay intact.
Example:
```svelte
<Accordion.Root>
  <Accordion.Item value="a">
    <Accordion.Trigger>Section A</Accordion.Trigger>
    <Accordion.Content>Content for section A.</Accordion.Content>
  </Accordion.Item>
  <Accordion.Item value="b">
    <Accordion.Trigger>Section B</Accordion.Trigger>
    <Accordion.Content>Content for section B.</Accordion.Content>
  </Accordion.Item>
</Accordion.Root>
```

  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.

    Collapsible.Trigger

## Table
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: data, table, grid, rows, columns
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Table } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Table } from '@dryui/ui/table'
Parts:
- Table.Root
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <table> attributes via rest props.
- Table.Header
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <tbody> attributes via rest props.
- Table.Body
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <tbody> attributes via rest props.
- Table.Footer
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <tbody> attributes via rest props.
- Table.Row
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <tr> attributes via rest props.
- Table.Head
  Props: scope ('col' | 'row'), accepted col, row, default 'col' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <td> attributes via rest props.
- Table.Cell
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <td> attributes via rest props.
- Table.Caption
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards native HTML attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Table.Root
    Table.Header
      Table.Row
        Table.Head
    Table.Body
      Table.Row
        Table.Cell
CSS variables: --dry-scrollbar-thumb, --dry-scrollbar-track, --dry-table-border, --dry-table-head-padding-y, --dry-table-header-bg, --dry-table-padding-x, --dry-table-padding-y
Data attributes: data-table-wrapper
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Table.Root>
  <Table.Header>
    <Table.Row>
      <Table.Head>Name</Table.Head>
      <Table.Head>Status</Table.Head>
    </Table.Row>
  </Table.Header>
  <Table.Body>
    <Table.Row>
      <Table.Cell>Alice</Table.Cell>
      <Table.Cell><Badge variant="soft">Active</Badge></Table.Cell>
    </Table.Row>
  </Table.Body>
</Table.Root>
```

## Avatar
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: user, profile, image, initials
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Avatar } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Avatar } from '@dryui/ui/avatar'
Props: src (string), Source URL for image, video, or other media content. | alt (string), Accessible alternative text announced when the media itself is not visible., default '' | fallback (string) | size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | shape ('circle' | 'square'), accepted circle, square, default 'circle' | status ('online' | 'offline' | 'busy' | 'away'), accepted online, offline, busy, away | badge (Snippet) | children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.
Native props: Forwards <span> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-avatar-font-size, --dry-avatar-radius, --dry-avatar-size
Data attributes: data-avatar | data-avatar-badge | data-avatar-status | data-avatar-wrapper | data-part | data-shape | data-size | data-status
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Avatar src="/avatar.jpg" alt="Jane" fallback="JD" />
```

CSS variables: --dry-badge-bg, --dry-badge-border, --dry-badge-color, --dry-badge-default-bg, --dry-badge-default-color, --dry-badge-font-size, --dry-badge-padding-x, --dry-badge-padding-y, --dry-badge-radius

## Chart
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: chart, graph, bar, line, data, visualization
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Chart } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Chart } from '@dryui/ui/chart'
Parts:
- Chart.Root
  Props: data (import('@dryui/primitives').ChartDataPoint[]), required | width (number) | height (number) | padding ({ top?: number; right?: number; bottom?: number; left?: number }) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <svg> attributes via rest props.
- Chart.Bars
  Props: radius (number), default 2 | onclick ((event: { label: string; value: number; index: number }) => void)
  Native props: Forwards native SVG attributes via rest props.
- Chart.Line
  Props: strokeWidth (number), default 2 | showDots (boolean), default true | dotRadius (number), default 3 | color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'currentColor'
  Native props: Forwards native SVG attributes via rest props.
- Chart.Area
  Props: strokeWidth (number), default 2 | showDots (boolean), default false | dotRadius (number), default 3 | color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'currentColor'
  Native props: Forwards native SVG attributes via rest props.
- Chart.Donut
  Props: innerRadius (number), default 60 | outerRadius (number), default 80 | label (Snippet<[{ total: number }]>), Visible label text shown for the control or item. | onclick ((event: { label: string; value: number; index: number }) => void)
  Native props: Forwards native SVG attributes via rest props.
- Chart.StackedBar
  Props: stackedData (import('@dryui/primitives').ChartStackedDataPoint[]), required | radius (number), default 2
  Native props: Forwards native SVG attributes via rest props.
- Chart.HorizontalBar
  Props: radius (number), default 2
  Native props: Forwards native SVG attributes via rest props.
- Chart.XAxis
  Props: none
  Native props: Forwards native SVG attributes via rest props.
- Chart.YAxis
  Props: ticks (number)
  Native props: Forwards native SVG attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Chart.Root
    Chart.Bars
    Chart.Line
    Chart.Area
    Chart.Donut
    Chart.StackedBar
    Chart.HorizontalBar
    Chart.XAxis
    Chart.YAxis
CSS variables: --dry-chart-axis-color, --dry-chart-bar-color, --dry-chart-bg, --dry-chart-border, --dry-chart-grid-color, --dry-chart-line-color, --dry-chart-radius
Data attributes: data-chart | data-chart-area | data-chart-axis | data-chart-bars | data-chart-container | data-chart-donut | data-chart-donut-label | data-chart-horizontal-bar | data-chart-line | data-chart-stacked-bar | data-clickable | data-part
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Chart.Root>
  <Chart.Bars>...</Chart.Bars>
  <Chart.Line>...</Chart.Line>
  <Chart.Area>...</Chart.Area>
  <Chart.Donut>...</Chart.Donut>
  <Chart.StackedBar>...</Chart.StackedBar>
  <Chart.HorizontalBar>...</Chart.HorizontalBar>
  <Chart.XAxis>...</Chart.XAxis>
  <Chart.YAxis>...</Chart.YAxis>
</Chart.Root>
```

## ChatThread
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: chat, thread, conversation, log
Kind: simple
Root import: import { ChatThread } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { ChatThread } from '@dryui/ui/chat-thread'
Props: messageCount (number), required | scrollKey (number), default 0 | children (Snippet<), Content rendered inside the component., required | index (number), required | viewTransitionName (string), required | isLatest (boolean), required
Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-chat-thread-gap, --dry-chat-thread-message-gap
Data attributes: data-chat-thread | data-chat-thread-message | data-chat-thread-viewport
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<ChatThread messageCount={messages.length}>
  {#snippet children({ index })}
    <ChatMessage role={messages[index].role} name={messages[index].name}>
      {messages[index].message}
    </ChatMessage>
  {/snippet}
</ChatThread>
```

## List
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: list, item, icon, dense
Kind: compound
Root import: import { List } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { List } from '@dryui/ui/list'
Parts:
- List.Root
  Props: dense (boolean), default false | disablePadding (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <ul> attributes via rest props.
- List.Item
  Props: interactive (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <li> attributes via rest props.
- List.ItemIcon
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- List.ItemText
  Props: primary (Snippet) | secondary (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- List.Subheader
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <li> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  List.Root
    List.Item
    List.ItemIcon
    List.ItemText
    List.Subheader
CSS variables: --dry-list-color, --dry-list-gap, --dry-list-item-active-bg, --dry-list-item-gap, --dry-list-item-hover-bg, --dry-list-item-icon-color, --dry-list-item-padding, --dry-list-item-radius, --dry-list-padding, --dry-list-primary-size, --dry-list-secondary-color, --dry-list-secondary-size, --dry-list-subheader-color
Data attributes: data-dense | data-disable-padding | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-interactive | data-list-item | data-list-item-icon | data-list-item-primary | data-list-item-secondary | data-list-item-text | data-list-root | data-list-subheader
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<List.Root>
  <List.Item>...</List.Item>
  <List.ItemIcon>...</List.ItemIcon>
  <List.ItemText>...</List.ItemText>
  <List.Subheader>...</List.Subheader>
</List.Root>
```

## Timeline
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: timeline, activity, feed, history, events
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Timeline } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Timeline } from '@dryui/ui/timeline'
Parts:
- Timeline.Root
  Props: orientation ('vertical' | 'horizontal'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted vertical, horizontal, default 'vertical' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Timeline.Item
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Timeline.Icon
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Timeline.Content
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Timeline.Title
  Props: level (1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6), Semantic heading level to render., accepted 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, default 3 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <h*> attributes via rest props.
- Timeline.Description
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <p> attributes via rest props.
- Timeline.Time
  Props: datetime (string) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <time> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Timeline.Root
    Timeline.Item
      Timeline.Icon
      Timeline.Content
        Timeline.Title
        Timeline.Description
        Timeline.Time
CSS variables: --dry-timeline-content-gap, --dry-timeline-dot-color, --dry-timeline-dot-size, --dry-timeline-gap, --dry-timeline-item-columns, --dry-timeline-item-gap, --dry-timeline-item-min-w, --dry-timeline-item-pl, --dry-timeline-item-pt, --dry-timeline-line-bottom, --dry-timeline-line-color, --dry-timeline-line-h, --dry-timeline-line-left, --dry-timeline-line-right, --dry-timeline-line-top, --dry-timeline-line-w
Data attributes: data-level | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Timeline.Root>
  <Timeline.Item>
    <Timeline.Icon />
    <Timeline.Content>
      <Timeline.Title>Event title</Timeline.Title>
      <Timeline.Description>Event description</Timeline.Description>
      <Timeline.Time>2 hours ago</Timeline.Time>
    </Timeline.Content>
  </Timeline.Item>
</Timeline.Root>
```

## Typography
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: text, heading, typography, prose, standalone
Kind: namespaced
Root import: import { Typography } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Typography } from '@dryui/ui/typography'
Parts:
- Typography.Heading
  Props: variant ('default' | 'display'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, display | level (1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6), Heading level used to render semantic h1 through h6 output., accepted 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <h*> attributes via rest props.
- Typography.Text
  Props: color ('default' | 'muted' | 'secondary'), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., accepted default, muted, secondary, Use muted or secondary for supporting copy without reaching for inline color styles. | variant ('default' | 'muted' | 'secondary'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, muted, secondary | size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, Applies DryUI text scale tokens for compact or emphasized body copy. | as ('p' | 'span' | 'div'), Text element to render for inline, block, or paragraph copy., accepted p, span, div | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
- Typography.Code
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
- Typography.Blockquote
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <blockquote> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-typography-text-color
Data attributes: data-as | data-color | data-level | data-size | data-variant
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Typography.Heading level={2}>Launch readiness</Typography.Heading>
<Typography.Text color="muted" size="sm">Use Typography.Text for supporting copy and metadata.</Typography.Text>
```

## Heading
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: text, heading, title, typography
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Heading } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Heading } from '@dryui/ui/heading'
Props: level (1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6), Semantic heading level to render., accepted 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, default 2 | variant ('default' | 'display'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, display, default 'default' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Native props: Forwards <h*> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-level | data-variant
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Heading level={2}>Launch readiness</Heading>
```

## Text
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: text, copy, paragraph, typography
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Text } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Text } from '@dryui/ui/text'
Props: as ('p' | 'span' | 'div'), Underlying HTML element to render for the component., accepted p, span, div, default 'p' | color ('default' | 'muted' | 'secondary'), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., accepted default, muted, secondary, default 'default', Use muted or secondary for supporting copy without reaching for inline color styles. | size ('xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted xs, sm, md, lg, default 'md', Applies DryUI text scale tokens for compact or emphasized body copy. | font ('sans' | 'mono'), accepted sans, mono, default 'sans' | weight ('normal' | 'medium' | 'semibold' | 'bold'), accepted normal, medium, semibold, bold | variant ('default' | 'label'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, label, default 'default' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-typography-text-color
Data attributes: data-color | data-font | data-size | data-variant | data-weight
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Text as="p" color="secondary" size="sm">Use Text for supporting copy, labels, and starter-kit body content.</Text>
```

## DescriptionList
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: details, summary, metadata, definitions
Kind: compound
Root import: import { DescriptionList } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { DescriptionList } from '@dryui/ui/description-list'
Parts:
- DescriptionList.Root
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <dl> attributes via rest props.
- DescriptionList.Item
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- DescriptionList.Term
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
- DescriptionList.Description
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  DescriptionList.Root
    DescriptionList.Item
      DescriptionList.Term
      DescriptionList.Description
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-description-list | data-description-list-dd | data-description-list-item | data-description-list-term
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<DescriptionList.Root>
  <DescriptionList.Item>
    <DescriptionList.Term>Workspace</DescriptionList.Term>
    <DescriptionList.Description>North America expansion</DescriptionList.Description>
  </DescriptionList.Item>
  <DescriptionList.Item>
    <DescriptionList.Term>Status</DescriptionList.Term>
    <DescriptionList.Description>Reviewing launch checklist</DescriptionList.Description>
  </DescriptionList.Item>
</DescriptionList.Root>
```

## Reveal
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: animation, reveal, intersection-observer, stagger, motion
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Reveal } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Reveal } from '@dryui/ui/reveal'
Props: variant (RevealVariant), Visual style preset for the component., default 'fade' | once (boolean), default true | threshold (number), default 0.18 | delay (number) | duration (number) | distance (number | string) | blendMode (BlendMode) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-reveal-delay, --dry-reveal-distance, --dry-reveal-duration, --dry-reveal-ease, --dry-reveal-hidden-blur, --dry-reveal-hidden-opacity, --dry-reveal-hidden-scale, --dry-reveal-mask-radius, --dry-reveal-mask-top, --dry-reveal-offset-y
Data attributes: data-reduced-motion | data-reveal | data-variant | data-visible
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Reveal variant="slide-up" delay={120}>
  <Card.Root>
    <Card.Content>Stage content as it enters the viewport.</Card.Content>
  </Card.Root>
</Reveal>
```

Tags: spotlight, pointer, hover, surface, motion

Subpath import: import { Spotlight } from '@dryui/ui/spotlight'

Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-spotlight-color, --dry-spotlight-intensity, --dry-spotlight-radius, --dry-spotlight-x, --dry-spotlight-y

```svelte
    <Card.Content>Hover to pull a radial highlight across the surface.</Card.Content>
  </Card.Root>
</Spotlight>
```

## DataGrid
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: data, grid, table, sort, filter, paginate
Kind: compound
Root import: import { DataGrid } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { DataGrid } from '@dryui/ui/data-grid'
Parts:
- DataGrid.Root
  Props: striped (boolean), default false | items (T[]), required | pageSize (number), default 10 | selectable (boolean), default false | onSelectionChange ((selected: string[]) => void) | actionBar (Snippet<[{ selectedCount: number; clearSelection: () => void }]>) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- DataGrid.Table
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <table> attributes via rest props.
- DataGrid.Header
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <tbody> attributes via rest props.
- DataGrid.Column
  Props: key (string), required | sortable (boolean) | filterable (boolean) | pinned (boolean) | resizable (boolean) | header (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <td> attributes via rest props.
- DataGrid.Body
  Props: children (Snippet<[{ items: T[]; page: number }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <tbody> attributes via rest props.
- DataGrid.Row
  Props: rowId (string) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <tr> attributes via rest props.
- DataGrid.Cell
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <td> attributes via rest props.
- DataGrid.Pagination
  Props: page (number), required | totalPages (number), required | totalItems (number), required | pageSize (number), required | canPrevious (boolean), required | canNext (boolean), required | previous (() => void), required | next (() => void), required | goto ((page: number) => void), required
  Native props: Forwards <element> attributes via rest props.
- DataGrid.SelectAll
  Props: none
  Native props: Forwards <td> attributes via rest props.
- DataGrid.SelectCell
  Props: rowId (string), required | rowLabel (string)
  Native props: Forwards <td> attributes via rest props.
- DataGrid.ExpandableRow
  Props: rowId (string), required | expandable (Snippet), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <tr> attributes via rest props.
- DataGrid.ExpandTrigger
  Props: rowId (string), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards native HTML attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  DataGrid.Root
    DataGrid.Table
    DataGrid.Header
    DataGrid.Column
    DataGrid.Body
    DataGrid.Row
    DataGrid.Cell
    DataGrid.Pagination
    DataGrid.SelectAll
    DataGrid.SelectCell
    DataGrid.ExpandableRow
    DataGrid.ExpandTrigger
CSS variables: --dry-data-grid-border, --dry-data-grid-head-padding-y, --dry-data-grid-header-bg, --dry-data-grid-padding-x, --dry-data-grid-padding-y, --dry-data-grid-pagination-gap, --dry-data-grid-row-hover, --dry-data-grid-row-stripe, --dry-data-grid-sort-color
Data attributes: data-data-grid | data-dg-body | data-dg-cell | data-dg-column | data-dg-header | data-dg-pagination | data-dg-row | data-dg-select-cell | data-dg-table | data-expanded | data-filter-input | data-pagination-info | data-pagination-next | data-pagination-prev | data-part | data-pinned | data-resizable | data-resizing | data-row-id | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-sort-indicator | data-sort-trigger | data-sortable | data-sorted | data-striped
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<DataGrid.Root>
  <DataGrid.Table>...</DataGrid.Table>
  <DataGrid.Header>...</DataGrid.Header>
  <DataGrid.Column>...</DataGrid.Column>
  <DataGrid.Body>...</DataGrid.Body>
  <DataGrid.Row>...</DataGrid.Row>
  <DataGrid.Cell>...</DataGrid.Cell>
  <DataGrid.Pagination>...</DataGrid.Pagination>
  <DataGrid.SelectAll>...</DataGrid.SelectAll>
  <DataGrid.SelectCell>...</DataGrid.SelectCell>
  <DataGrid.ExpandableRow>...</DataGrid.ExpandableRow>
  <DataGrid.ExpandTrigger>...</DataGrid.ExpandTrigger>
</DataGrid.Root>
```

## Carousel
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: slider, carousel, scroll, gallery, slideshow
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Carousel } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Carousel } from '@dryui/ui/carousel'
Parts:
- Carousel.Root
  Props: orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | loop (boolean), default false | autoplay (number | false), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Carousel.Viewport
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Carousel.Slide
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Carousel.Prev
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- Carousel.Next
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- Carousel.Dots
  Props: none
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Carousel.Thumbnails
  Props: position ('bottom' | 'left' | 'right'), accepted bottom, left, right | children (Snippet<[{ index: number; isActive: boolean; scrollTo: (index: number) => void }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Carousel.Root
    Carousel.Viewport
    Carousel.Slide
    Carousel.Prev
    Carousel.Next
    Carousel.Dots
    Carousel.Thumbnails
CSS variables: --dry-carousel-gap, --dry-carousel-slide-size
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-carousel-dots | data-carousel-root | data-carousel-slide | data-carousel-thumbnails | data-carousel-viewport | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-position
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Carousel.Root>
  <Carousel.Viewport>...</Carousel.Viewport>
  <Carousel.Slide>...</Carousel.Slide>
  <Carousel.Prev>...</Carousel.Prev>
  <Carousel.Next>...</Carousel.Next>
  <Carousel.Dots>...</Carousel.Dots>
  <Carousel.Thumbnails>...</Carousel.Thumbnails>
</Carousel.Root>
```

## Tree
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: tree, hierarchy, expand, collapse, nested
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Tree } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Tree } from '@dryui/ui/tree'
Parts:
- Tree.Root
  Props: defaultExpanded (string[]), default [] | selectedItem (string | null), default null, bindable | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Tree.Item
  Props: itemId (string), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Tree.ItemLabel
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Tree.ItemChildren
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Tree.Root
    Tree.Item
    Tree.ItemLabel
    Tree.ItemChildren
CSS variables: --dry-tree-icon-size, --dry-tree-indent, --dry-tree-item-hover-bg, --dry-tree-item-padding, --dry-tree-item-radius, --dry-tree-item-selected-bg, --dry-tree-item-selected-color, --dry-tree-item-selected-indicator
Data attributes: data-expanded | data-item-id | data-part | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-state | data-tree-label
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Tree.Root>
  <Tree.Item>...</Tree.Item>
  <Tree.ItemLabel>...</Tree.ItemLabel>
  <Tree.ItemChildren>...</Tree.ItemChildren>
</Tree.Root>
```

## Gauge
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: gauge, meter, dial, svg, dashboard, threshold
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Gauge } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Gauge } from '@dryui/ui/gauge'
Props: value (number), Current controlled or bindable value., required | min (number), Minimum allowed value., default 0 | max (number), Maximum allowed value., default 100 | startAngle (number), default -135 | endAngle (number), default 135 | thresholds ({ value: number; color: string }[]) | label (Snippet<[{ value: number; percentage: number }]>), Visible label text shown for the control or item. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Native props: Forwards <svg> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-gauge-fill-color, --dry-gauge-size, --dry-gauge-stroke-width, --dry-gauge-track-color
Data attributes: data-gauge | data-gauge-label | data-part
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Gauge value={72} min={0} max={100} thresholds={[{ value: 30, color: "red" }, { value: 70, color: "orange" }, { value: 90, color: "green" }]} />
```

Tags: sparkline, chart, inline, trend, svg, data
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Sparkline } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Sparkline } from '@dryui/ui/sparkline'
Props: data (number[]), required | width (number), default 100 | height (number), default 32 | color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'currentColor' | filled (boolean), default false | strokeWidth (number), default 2 | highlightLast (boolean), default false

Data attributes: data-part | data-sparkline
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte

```

## FlipCard
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: card, flip, hover, click, 3d, animation
Kind: compound
Root import: import { FlipCard } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { FlipCard } from '@dryui/ui/flip-card'
Parts:
- FlipCard.Root
  Props: trigger ('hover' | 'click'), accepted hover, click, default 'hover' | direction ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | flipped (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- FlipCard.Front
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- FlipCard.Back
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  FlipCard.Root
    FlipCard.Front
    FlipCard.Back
CSS variables: --dry-flip-card-back-transform, --dry-flip-card-duration, --dry-flip-card-front-transform, --dry-flip-card-perspective
Data attributes: data-direction | data-flip-card | data-flip-card-back | data-flip-card-front | data-flipped | data-part | data-trigger
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<FlipCard.Root trigger="hover">
  <FlipCard.Front>Front content</FlipCard.Front>
  <FlipCard.Back>Back content</FlipCard.Back>
</FlipCard.Root>
```

Package: @dryui/ui

Root import: import { VideoEmbed } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { VideoEmbed } from '@dryui/ui/video-embed'
Props: src (string), Source URL for image, video, or other media content., required | poster (string) | title (string), Primary heading or label text. | provider ('youtube' | 'vimeo' | 'native'), accepted youtube, vimeo, native | autoplay (boolean), default false | aspectRatio (string), default '16/9' | playButton (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.

Data attributes: data-activated | data-part | data-provider | data-video-embed
Accessibility: none
Example:

## Map
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: display
Tags: map, geo, marker, popup, layer, geojson
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Map } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Map } from '@dryui/ui/map'
Parts:
- Map.Root
  Props: center (LngLat), default [0 | zoom (number), default 2 | minZoom (number) | maxZoom (number) | mapStyle (string) | createMap ((container: HTMLDivElement, options: MapOptions) => MapInstance) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Map.Marker
  Props: position (LngLat), required | color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component. | class (string)
- Map.Popup
  Props: maxWidth (string), default '20rem' | closeButton (boolean), default true | closeOnClick (boolean), default true | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | class (string)
- Map.Layer
  Props: id (string), Unique HTML id used for labels, aria relationships, or targeted styling., required | type ('heatmap' | 'polygon' | 'fill' | 'circle' | 'line'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted heatmap, polygon, fill, circle, line, required | data (GeoJsonData), required | color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component. | opacity (number)
- Map.Controls
  Props: position ('top-left' | 'top-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-right'), accepted top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right, default 'top-right' | navigation (boolean), default false | fullscreen (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Structure:
  Map.Root
    Map.Marker
      Map.Popup
    Map.Controls
CSS variables: --dry-map-border, --dry-map-radius
Data attributes: data-map-root | data-part
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Map.Root center={[-122.4, 37.8]} zoom={12}>
  <Map.Marker position={[-122.4, 37.8]}>
    <Map.Popup>San Francisco</Map.Popup>
  </Map.Marker>
  <Map.Controls navigation fullscreen />
</Map.Root>
```

### feedback

## Alert
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: feedback
Tags: message, notification, info, warning, error
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Alert } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Alert } from '@dryui/ui/alert'
Props: variant (AlertVariant), Visual style preset for the component., default 'info' | dismissible (boolean), default false | onDismiss (() => void) | icon (Snippet) | title (Snippet), Primary heading or label text. | description (Snippet), Supporting copy that explains the current control or section. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-alert-bg, --dry-alert-border, --dry-alert-icon-color, --dry-radius-nested
Data attributes: data-alert | data-alert-body | data-alert-close | data-alert-description | data-alert-icon | data-alert-title | data-dismissible | data-variant
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<Alert variant="info">
  {#snippet description()}Your changes have been saved.{/snippet}
</Alert>
```

## Toast
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: feedback
Tags: notification, toast, snackbar, alert
Kind: compound
Root import: import { Toast } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Toast } from '@dryui/ui/toast'
Parts:
- Toast.Provider
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Toast.Root
  Props: id (string), Unique HTML id used for labels, aria relationships, or targeted styling., required | variant ('info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted info, success, warning, error, default 'info' | persistent (boolean) | progress (number) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- Toast.Title
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <p> attributes via rest props.
- Toast.Description
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <p> attributes via rest props.
- Toast.Close
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <button> attributes via rest props.
- Toast.Action
  Props: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | onclick (() => void)
  Native props: Forwards native HTML attributes via rest props.
Structure:
  Toast.Root
    Toast.Provider
    Toast.Title
    Toast.Description
    Toast.Close
    Toast.Action
CSS variables: --dry-radius-nested, --dry-toast-accent, --dry-toast-action-hover-bg, --dry-toast-bg, --dry-toast-border
Data attributes: data-part | data-persistent | data-position | data-removing | data-toast-action | data-toast-id | data-variant
Accessibility: Do not rely on toast content as the only place critical workflow information appears.
Example:
```svelte
<Toast.Root>
  <Toast.Provider>...</Toast.Provider>
  <Toast.Title>...</Toast.Title>
  <Toast.Description>...</Toast.Description>
  <Toast.Close>...</Toast.Close>
  <Toast.Action>...</Toast.Action>
</Toast.Root>
```

Package: @dryui/ui
Category: feedback
Tags: loading, progress, bar, percentage
Kind: simple
Root import: import { Progress } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { Progress } from '@dryui/ui/progress'
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | color ('blue' | 'green' | 'red' | 'yellow'), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., accepted blue, green, red, yellow, default 'blue' | value (number | undefined), Current controlled or bindable value. | max (number), Maximum allowed value., default 100 | segments (ProgressSegment[]) | thresholds (ProgressThreshold[]) | showLabel (boolean | 'inside' | 'outside')
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-progress-bar, --dry-progress-height, --dry-progress-label-inside, --dry-progress-radius

Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte

```

### interaction

## DragAndDrop
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: interaction
Tags: drag, drop, reorder, sortable, list
Kind: compound
Root import: import { DragAndDrop } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { DragAndDrop } from '@dryui/ui/drag-and-drop'
Parts:
- DragAndDrop.Root
  Props: items (T[]), required | onReorder ((items: T[]) => void), required | orientation ('vertical' | 'horizontal'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted vertical, horizontal, default 'vertical' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- DragAndDrop.Item
  Props: index (number), required | children (Snippet<[{ isDragging: boolean; isOver: boolean }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- DragAndDrop.Handle
  Props: index (number), required | children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.
  Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
- DragAndDrop.Group
  Props: none
Structure:
  DragAndDrop.Root
    DragAndDrop.Item
    DragAndDrop.Handle
    DragAndDrop.Group
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-dnd-grip | data-dnd-handle | data-dnd-item | data-dnd-preview | data-dnd-root | data-drag-active | data-dragging | data-index | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-over | data-over-end
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<DragAndDrop.Root>
  <DragAndDrop.Item>...</DragAndDrop.Item>
  <DragAndDrop.Handle>...</DragAndDrop.Handle>
  <DragAndDrop.Group>...</DragAndDrop.Group>
</DragAndDrop.Root>
```

### visual

## ChromaticShift
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: visual
Tags: chromatic, aberration, rgb, glitch, effect, animation
Kind: simple
Root import: import { ChromaticShift } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { ChromaticShift } from '@dryui/ui/chromatic-shift'
Props: offset (number), default 3 | channels (ChromaticShiftChannels), default 'rgb' | trigger (ChromaticShiftTrigger), default 'hover' | animated (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: --dry-chromatic-offset
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-animated | data-channels | data-chromatic-shift | data-reduced-motion
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<ChromaticShift>Content</ChromaticShift>
```

## BorderBeam
Package: @dryui/ui
Category: visual
Tags: border, beam, glow, ring, highlight, effect
Kind: simple
Root import: import { BorderBeam } from '@dryui/ui'
Subpath import: import { BorderBeam } from '@dryui/ui/border-beam'
Props: size (BorderBeamSize), Effect mode preset: compact control ring (`sm`), full border glow (`md`), or bottom-edge line trace (`line`). | colorVariant (BorderBeamColorVariant), Beam palette preset matching the upstream colorful, mono, ocean, or sunset glow treatments. | theme (BorderBeamTheme), Color tuning for dark or light surfaces, or system preference when set to `auto`. | staticColors (boolean) | duration (number) | active (boolean), Whether the beam is currently glowing. Disabling it plays the fade-out sequence before the effect becomes idle. | borderRadius (number | string), Optional border radius override for the beam host. When omitted, the first child radius is detected automatically. | brightness (number) | saturation (number) | hueRange (number) | strength (number), Intensity multiplier for the beam stroke, inner glow, and bloom layers. | onActivate (() => void), Callback fired after the beam fade-in animation completes. | onDeactivate (() => void), Callback fired after the beam fade-out animation completes. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Native props: Forwards <div> attributes via rest props.
CSS variables: none
Data attributes: data-active (Present while the beam is rendering its active glow and bloom layers.) | data-beam (Per-instance marker on the beam host used to scope the injected effect styles.) | data-beam-bloom (Bloom layer element that renders the outer glow spill around the active beam.) | data-fading (Present while the beam is playing its fade-out sequence.) | data-size (Reflects the current effect mode preset., values sm, md, line)
Accessibility: none
Example:
```svelte
<BorderBeam>Content</BorderBeam>
```
